title: YES Kennedy-Lugar (Youth Exchange & Study Abroad)
html:
YES Kennedy-Lugar

Stub. The U.S. State Department–funded high-school study-abroad scholarship Yahir was trying to land in fall 2019 — "sign up for YES Kennedy-Lugar" (2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda), then the urgent late-October scramble "URGENTLY** scan and do YES SHIT — Scan transcripts to ap class or to y.gonzalez, Scan the signed agreement, Essay to host family, Solidify the essay part — Call 1-202-833-7522 / Fax 1-202-833-7523"* (2019 10 29 talk to mrs bland about internship). The "Essay to host family" line shows he made it past the initial screen. The thwarted/delayed precursor to the Shanghai route via CIEE he'd take five years later.

Source summaries

  • 2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda
  • 2019 10 29 talk to mrs bland about internship
